# YouTube Competitive Analysis (adapter)

Source skill: [`yt-competitive-analysis/`](../../../yt-competitive-analysis/) — see
[`yt-competitive-analysis/SKILL.md`](../../../yt-competitive-analysis/SKILL.md).

## When to use

- Quarterly YouTube strategy review
- Identifying outlier videos before deciding on next thumbnail/title
- Benchmarking your channel against 5–20 competitors

## Output

- Outlier list (videos > 2x channel average)
- Title patterns + thumbnail visual patterns
- Per-channel benchmark table
